title: Credit union inside Syracuse Housing Authority closes as I-81 construction creeps closer
summary: A credit union branch serving Syracuse Housing Authority residents closed as Interstate 81 construction activity increases in the area. The closure reflects disruption to financial services access for a vulnerable resident population during major infrastructure work.
department_refs: Department of Neighborhood and Community Relations

political_signal.description: Coverage of service disruption to economically vulnerable residents due to major state infrastructure project; potential equity implications for housing authority population access to financial services

processing_notes: Article addresses intersection of state-level infrastructure project (I-81) and local housing authority services
No dollar amounts or specific construction timeline provided in excerpt
Author is local reporter; suggest monitoring for follow-up coverage on resident impacts
Potential connection to broader I-81 community impact assessment and mitigation planning
